search.title: Search indexed repositories
search.scopeNote: Results come from repositories ingested by GitHub Trending+, not all of GitHub. Keyword search supports typo tolerance.
search.queryRequired: Enter at least a keyword or tag to search.
search.queryTooShort: Keywords must be at least 2 characters.
search.empty: No repositories match your search in our index.

hero.title: See what's heating up on GitHub in 3 minutes a day
hero.meta: Updated {date} UTC · Awesome/zombie repos filtered · <rules>Ranking rules</rules>
hero.tzNote: All periods use UTC boundaries · <glossary>Signal glossary</glossary>

ph.panelAttribution: Launch metrics from Product Hunt. We do not host PH comments or voting.
ph.attribution: Some cards show a PH badge when linked to a recent Product Hunt launch.
ph.footer: Launch signals may include data from Product Hunt.

feed.error: Could not load rankings. Try again.
feed.phEmpty: No Product Hunt launches in this window yet. Run PH ingest or widen the period.
feed.phEmptyLinked: No GitHub-linked launches in this window. Try「All launches」or a shorter period.

tab.hintVelocity: Sorted by absolute stars gained in the selected period
tab.hintPh: Sorted by Product Hunt upvotes in the selected launch window
tab.hintPhLinked: Only launches linked to a public GitHub repository
tab.phAttribution: Launch metrics from Product Hunt. We do not host PH comments or voting.

phFilter.label: GitHub repository
phFilter.legendGithub: Linked to a public GitHub repo

launch.notIndexed: Not indexed on this site yet
launch.detailAttribution: Launch metrics from Product Hunt. We do not host PH comments or voting.
launch.indexedBridgeBody: This repository is in our chart. Open the trend detail page for star velocity, health signals, and alternatives.
launch.notIndexedTitle: Not indexed on this site yet
launch.notIndexedBody: We linked this launch to a public GitHub repository, but it is not in our ingest yet. Star velocity and health metrics appear after the repo is indexed.
launch.notFoundBody: This Product Hunt post is outside our ingest window or the slug is invalid. Try the PH feed with a wider period.

footer.unofficial: Unofficial — not affiliated with GitHub, Inc.
footer.ph: Launch signals may include data from <phLink>Product Hunt</phLink>

repo.verifiedNote: One-line summary from the repository description on GitHub

whyHot.title: Why hot now
whyHot.early: Early Signal — high relative growth under 5k stars

trust.title: Adopt with confidence
trust.securityVal: No known critical CVE in default branch scan
trust.busFair: Bus factor: moderate — review contributor spread
trust.busLow: Bus factor: at risk — low recent activity

alt.title: Alternatives
alt.intro: Same topic — health-ranked peers. Open the matrix or jump to curves only.

about.title: About this project
about.empty: No project summary is available yet. Open the README on GitHub for details.

favorites.title: Your favorites
favorites.subtitle: Repos saved on this device — newest first. Metrics refresh when you open this page.
favorites.emptyBody: Save repos from the velocity chart or repository detail — they stay here for your next visit.
favorites.privacyNote: Local only: favorites are stored in this browser. Clearing site data or switching devices removes them.
favorites.notIndexedHint: Not indexed yet — open on GitHub for the latest info.
favorites.limitReached: You've reached the 200-repo limit. Remove some items first.
favorites.hydrateWarning: Could not refresh live metrics. Showing saved snapshots.

about.title: About
about.disclaimer: This site is unofficial and not affiliated with GitHub.
about.dataSource: Rankings use data from the GitHub GraphQL API and our ingest pipeline. Optional integrations may include OSS Insight (star history) and Product Hunt (launch signals). Results reflect indexed repositories only, not all of GitHub.
about.favoritesBody: Saved repositories are stored only in your current browser via localStorage. They are not tied to a GitHub account and are not synced across devices. Clearing site data or using another browser starts with an empty list.
about.phBody: When configured, we ingest recent launches from Product Hunt and link them to indexed GitHub repositories. Orange PH badges show vote count and launch date and open the original post on producthunt.com. Data is attributed per Product Hunt API terms.

empty.feed: No ranking data yet. Run ingest to populate.
